columns.extraction_plan: The median age for the treatment arm (SOC + AAP) is reported in Table 1, "Baseline characteristics", on page 5. Locate the row "Age (years)" and the sub-row "Median (IQR)". The value in the column "SOC + AAP" is "67 (62-71)".

The median age for the control arm (SOC-alone) is reported in Table 1, "Baseline characteristics", on page 5. Locate the row "Age (years)" and the sub-row "Median (IQR)". The value in the column "SOC-alone" is "67 (62-72)".
